ROUND 2 — turret STILL wrong. The CR-2/CR-3 fixes were cosmetic (code-only). Root cause on BOTH the main-character sprite AND the purple cannon/turret (fires straight): each has its OWN weapon baked into the sprite AND a procedural drawn-over weapon that moves/aims -> TWO guns visible. REMEDY (needs new sprites AND the build showing the right sprite/frame + firing from its real muzzle, done together): regenerate the hero and turret sprites with NO baked-in weapon (or proper directional/rotating art), and have the build show the matching sprite and spawn the shot from that sprite's muzzle -> exactly ONE weapon per entity, drawn where it fires. Not another code-offset nudge.
